ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm instance */,
  "name_instance" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm instance */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Parameter n for algorithm configuration */,
  "m" REAL /* Parameter m for algorithm configuration */,
  "tot_real_time" REAL /* Total real time taken for the execution */,
  "tot_cputime" REAL /* Total CPU time taken for the execution */,
  "tot_bb" REAL /* Total best bound found during optimization */,
  "tot_lb" REAL /* Total lower bound achieved */,
  "tot_lb_root" REAL /* Total lower bound at the root node */,
  "tot_heuristic" REAL /* Heuristic value achieved during optimization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_instances_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated algorithm instance */,
  "tot_build_dd" REAL /* Total time spent on build decision diagrams */,
  "tot_pricing" REAL /* Total time spent on pricing */,
  "tot_reduce_cost_fixing" REAL /* Total time spent on reducing cost fixing */,
  "rel_error" REAL /* Relative error compared to expected */,
  "global_lower_bound" REAL /* Global lower bound achieved */,
  "global_upper_bound" REAL /* Global upper bound achieved */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES algorithm_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm setting */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated algorithm instance */,
  "stabilization" REAL /* Stabilization parameter used in optimization */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter used in optimization */,
  "pricing_solver" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing solver used */,
  "first_size_graph" INTEGER /* Size of the first graph created */,
  "size_after_reduced_cost" INTEGER /* Size of the graph after reduced costs applied */,
  "optimization_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for optimization (e.g., greedy, exhaustive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_settings_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES algorithm_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iteration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration log */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated algorithm instance */,
  "nb_nodes_explored" INTEGER /* Number of nodes explored during this iteration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "nb_iterations_rvnd" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed */,
  "strong_branching" INTEGER /* Indicates if strong branching was used */,
  "branching_point" REAL /* Branching point value for the optimization */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iteration_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES algorithm_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_instance_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared instance */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shared algorithm instance */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* Reference to the user or team the instance is shared with */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level for the shared instance (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id")
)
